falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a blowoff top rather than a continuation pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above $X (specific resistance level) with a 3% close above the level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed breakout above a key resistance would invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by signaling a clear trend reversal or continuation, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 70%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the current call, as the foundational similarity metric would no longer support the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
